name: Bulk Status Update

metadata.description: Tests the agent's ability to bulk-update statuses of items matching a criteria

domainHints: This is a sprint planning board for an agile software development team. Work items have statuses: todo, in-progress, in-review, done. Priorities are: critical, high, medium, low. Story points use Fibonacci numbers: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13.

datasets.name: Bulk status update
datasets.prompt: Mark all tasks in review as done

rubrics.name: Task Completion
rubrics.description: Did the agent change the status of all items that were 'in-review' to 'done'? The item 'Design database schema' was the only item in 'in-review' status and should now be 'done'.

rubrics.name: Selective Update
rubrics.description: Were items NOT in 'in-review' status left unchanged? 'Set up CI/CD pipeline' should remain 'done', 'Implement user authentication' should remain 'in-progress', and 'Write API documentation', 'Add unit tests for auth module', 'Fix responsive layout on mobile' should remain 'todo'.

rubrics.name: Data Integrity
rubrics.description: Were all non-status properties of all work items (titles, priorities, assignees, story points) preserved without modification?

dataInterpretationPrompt: The input is the initial state of an agile sprint board as a tree structure containing work items and team members. The output is the final state after an AI agent processed a user prompt. Compare the input and output trees to evaluate whether the agent correctly fulfilled the user's request while preserving existing data.
